subcodes.title: Prayer in reply to Mirza Muhammad 'Ali Nahri et al
subcodes.first_line: O God! I bear witness before Thee to that whereunto Thou dost bear witness unto Thyself and unto all created beings, Thy servants, that Thou art God, no God is there but Thee, Single art Thou, without peer, and naught existeth in Thine Essence save Thy Self [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: بسم الله الرحمن الرحیم. اللهم انی اشهدک بما تشهد لنفسک و للخلق عبادک انک انت الله لا اله الا انت وحدک لا شریک لک و لا لکینونیتک خلقه دون ذاتک
subcodes.subjects: @transcendence; unknowability of God, @wisdom [hikmat], @family of Muhammad; early figures in Islam, @interpretation of words and passages in scripture, @alteration of the divine will [bada]
